===[[Pokémon Pokopia]]===
Though he is not referred to by name, Red is mentioned in some of {{g|Pokopia}}'s [[Human Records]]. In "[[Saffron City]] Press Release", [[Magnet Train]] anniversary ceremony will include the appearance of the current [[Kanto]] [[Pokémon Champion|League Champion]], who will have special exhibition battles with three children selected by lottery. Reading this record rewards {{poko|Ditto}} with the simple hair, which resembles Red's hairstyle. In "Poké Week (Issue 122)", after decades of requesting interviews with the legendary Trainer and former Champion of the Kanto region, an exclusive meeting was finally acquired, in which Red showed a photo of himself as a smiling young boy surrounded by his Pokémon, while the reporter, who is a personal huge fan of the former Champion, could not stop crying after the interview. Reading this record rewards Ditto with the red outfit, which resembles Red's clothing in {{game|FireRed and LeafGreen|s}}.
